build_systems.name: Tauri 2
build_systems.notes: Bundles frontend (Vite), Rust backend, sidecar dist, and agent-sources as app resources. Identifier: com.vibedata.skill-builder. CSP allows Anthropic API + GitHub API. Dev port: DEV_PORT (default 1420), HMR on DEV_PORT+1.

build_systems.name: Vite 7
build_systems.notes: React + Tailwind plugin. Path alias `@/` → `./src/`. E2E mock path alias via TAURI_E2E env var.

build_systems.name: esbuild (sidecar)
build_systems.notes: Compiles TypeScript sidecar to `app/sidecar/dist/` for Tauri bundling. No hot-reload — restart `npm run dev` after editing sidecar source.

build_systems.name: GitHub Actions
build_systems.notes: ci.yml: typecheck + unit tests (Node 22) + cargo test + clippy + docs build gate. docs.yml: VitePress build + GitHub Pages deploy. release.yml: multi-platform Tauri build + sign + publish.

test_frameworks.name: Promptfoo
test_frameworks.scope: Agent smoke tests (live API calls — manual only, do not run autonomously)

applications.name: Skill Builder Desktop
applications.description: Multi-agent workflow for creating domain-specific Claude skills. React frontend + Rust backend + Node.js agent sidecar.

frontend_components.description: Reusable UI components (GitHub login, error boundary, research summary, etc.)

frontend_pages.description: Page-level route components: dashboard, workflow, settings, refine, usage, test

frontend_stores.description: Zustand state stores: auth, settings, workflow, refine, usage

frontend_hooks.description: Custom React hooks: agent streaming, node validation

frontend_lib.description: Utilities: Tauri invocation, toast, workflow step definitions, clarification types, help URLs

rust_commands.description: Tauri command handlers: agent, workflow, skill, workspace, settings, refine, usage, github_auth, github_import, imported_skills, skill_test, clarification, feedback, files, git, lifecycle, sidecar_lifecycle, workflow_lifecycle

rust_db.description: SQLite schema, migrations (code-only), and query helpers. Migrations registered in MIGRATIONS constant.

rust_agents.description: Agent runtime: sidecar process pool, event routing, lifecycle

sidecar_runner.description: JSONL protocol handler, SDK invocation, reads stdin JSON config, streams events to stdout

sidecar_events.description: Canonical AgentEvent type definitions — service boundary contract between sidecar and Rust

sidecar_mock.description: Mock mode: replays bundled templates with no API calls. Activated via MOCK_AGENTS=true.

agent_prompts.description: Flat directory of .md agent prompts: answer-evaluator, confirm-decisions, detailed-research, eval-skill, generate-skill, refine-skill, research-orchestrator, validate-quality, validate-skill

workspace_instructions.description: Shared agent instructions deployed to workspace .claude/CLAUDE.md at app startup

key_directories.app/src/: Frontend React/TypeScript runtime (components, pages, stores, hooks, lib, tests)
key_directories.app/src-tauri/src/: Rust backend runtime (Tauri commands, DB, agents, logging, startup)
key_directories.app/sidecar/: Node.js/TypeScript agent sidecar (JSONL protocol, SDK invocation, mock mode)
key_directories.agent-sources/agents/: Agent prompts — flat directory, validated by scripts/validate.sh
key_directories.agent-sources/plugins/: Plugin definitions (skills, agents, MCP config, tooling)
key_directories.docs/user-guide/: VitePress user documentation, deployed via docs.yml
key_directories.docs/design/: Design docs and architecture decision records
key_directories..claude/skills/: Workflow playbooks for Claude Code CLI skills

dependencies_internal.rust → sidecar: Node.js child process, stdin/stdout JSONL protocol
dependencies_internal.frontend → sidecar_events: Typed via agent-events.ts contract, received as Tauri events

commands.install: cd app && npm install && npm run sidecar:build
commands.dev_mock: cd app && MOCK_AGENTS=true npm run dev
commands.test_agents_smoke: cd app && npm run test:agents:smoke  # MANUAL ONLY — makes live API calls

conventions.rust: Standard Rust conventions, clippy enforced. Every Tauri command logs info! on entry, error! on failure.
conventions.commits: Granular — one concern per commit. Stage specific files (`git add <file>`, not `git add .`).
conventions.linear_project: All issues for this repo go under Skill Builder

key_references.frontend_rules: .claude/rules/frontend-design.md — AD brand, component constraints, state indicators
key_references.rust_rules: .claude/rules/rust-backend.md — command conventions, error types, Rust testing

notes_for_agents.startup: Read this file before exploring code. It is the primary startup context for structure, entrypoints, modules, and commands. Skip repo-wide rediscovery if it covers your task.
notes_for_agents.sidecar_hot_reload: Sidecar has NO hot-reload. Restart `npm run dev` after editing app/sidecar/ files.
notes_for_agents.sdk_limitations: @anthropic-ai/claude-agent-sdk does NOT support TeamCreate, TaskCreate, SendMessage. Use the Task tool for sub-agents. Multiple Task calls in the same turn run in parallel.
notes_for_agents.test_autonomy: Only `test:agents:structural` may be run autonomously — no API calls. Never run `test:agents:smoke` autonomously.
notes_for_agents.db_location: Database is at Tauri app_data_dir()/skill-builder.db — NOT in the workspace (~/.vibedata/). macOS: ~/Library/Application Support/com.vibedata.skill-builder/skill-builder.db
notes_for_agents.migrations: DB migrations are code-only in db.rs MIGRATIONS constant — no separate migration files directory.
notes_for_agents.workspace_path: Default workspace: ~/.vibedata/ (configurable). Set by resolve_workspace_path() in workspace.rs.
notes_for_agents.mock_mode: MOCK_AGENTS=true replays bundled templates in app/sidecar/mock-templates/ with no API calls.
notes_for_agents.agent_tests_changed: When agents/*.md or agent-sources/workspace/** changes, run `cd app && npm run test:agents:structural` before reporting completion.
notes_for_agents.update_repo_map: Refresh this file whenever you change architecture, entrypoints, commands, modules, or package structure.
